query: INSERT INTO device_skill_state (workspace_id, device_key_id, skill_id, applied_commit, reported_at) SELECT $1, $2, r.skill_id, r.applied_commit, $3 FROM UNNEST($5::TEXT[], $6::BYTEA[]) AS r(skill_id, applied_commit) JOIN topos_entitled_skills($1, $4, $2) e ON e.skill_id = r.skill_id ON CONFLICT (workspace_id, device_key_id, skill_id) DO UPDATE SET applied_commit = excluded.applied_commit, reported_at = excluded.reported_at, detached = 0, detached_at = NULL
